### DoenetML IFrame Renderer

- Source: [DoenetML/packages/doenetml-iframe/README.md](../DoenetML/packages/doenetml-iframe/README.md)
- Summary: This workspace contains a DoenetML viewer and editor that render inside of an iframe. This allows DoenetML to be used without affecting the surrounding page. It also allows multiple versions of DoenetML to be used at the same time.

## DoenetML Component Catalog

Each schema component below lists its documentation pages, source definitions, allowed children, attributes, and public properties.

### <abs>

- Description: absolute value
- Accepts string children: yes
- Top-level component: yes
- Documentation pages: [packages/docs-nextra/pages/reference/abs.mdx](../DoenetML/packages/docs-nextra/pages/reference/abs.mdx)
- Source definitions: [packages/doenetml-worker-javascript/src/components/MathOperators.js](../DoenetML/packages/doenetml-worker-javascript/src/components/MathOperators.js) (Abs; extends MathBaseOperatorOneInput)
- Allowed children: rightHandSide, topic, m, me, men, mrow, sum, product, clampNumber, wrapNumberPeriodic, round, setSmallToZero, convertSetToList, ceil, floor, abs, sign, mean, median, variance, standardDeviation, count, min, max, mod, gcd, lcm, extractMath, clampFunction, wrapFunctionPeriodic, derivative, extractMathOperator, equilibriumPoint, equilibriumLine, atom, ion, ionicCompound, electronConfiguration, h, matrixInput, text, textList, math, mathList, tupleList, numberList, point, coords, line, vector, angle, mathInput, choice, number, integer, function, piecewiseFunction, interval, sequence, cell, conditionalContent, selectFromSequence, evaluate, selectRandomNumbers, sampleRandomNumbers, selectPrimeNumbers, samplePrimeNumbers, substitute, periodicSet, intComma, pluralize, lorem, endpoint, subsetOfReals, bestFitLine, matrix, latex, pointList, intervalList, vectorList
- Attributes:
  - name
  - hide; values=true, false
  - disabled; values=true, false
  - fixed; values=true, false
  - fixLocation; values=true, false
  - styleNumber
  - isResponse; values=true, false
  - extend
  - copy
  - format; values=text, latex
  - simplify; values=none, full, numbers, numbersPreserveOrder, normalizeOrder, true, false; autocomplete=none, full, numbers, numbersPreserveOrder, normalizeOrder
  - expand; values=true, false
  - displayDigits
  - displayDecimals
  - displaySmallAsZero
  - padZeros; values=true, false
  - renderMode
  - unordered; values=true, false
  - createVectors; values=true, false
  - createIntervals; values=true, false
  - functionSymbols
  - referencesAreFunctionSymbols
  - splitSymbols; values=true, false
  - parseScientificNotation; values=true, false
  - displayBlanks; values=true, false
  - assumptions
  - draggable; values=true, false
  - layer
  - anchor
  - positionFromAnchor; values=upperRight, upperLeft, lowerRight, lowerLeft, top, bottom, left, right, center
- Properties:
  - hide; type=boolean
  - modifyIndirectly; type=boolean
  - styleNumber; type=integer
  - isResponse; type=boolean
  - permid; type=text
  - format; type=text
  - simplify; type=text
  - expand; type=boolean
  - renderMode; type=text
  - createVectors; type=boolean
  - createIntervals; type=boolean
  - functionSymbols; type=textList
  - splitSymbols; type=boolean
  - parseScientificNotation; type=boolean
  - displayBlanks; type=boolean
  - assumptions; type=math
  - draggable; type=boolean
  - layer; type=number
  - positionFromAnchor; type=text
  - hidden; type=boolean
  - disabled; type=boolean
  - fixed; type=boolean
  - fixLocation; type=boolean
  - doenetML; type=text
  - textColor; type=text
  - backgroundColor; type=text
  - textStyleDescription; type=text
  - anchor; type=point
  - displayDigits; type=integer
  - displayDecimals; type=integer
  - displaySmallAsZero; type=number
  - padZeros; type=boolean
  - unordered; type=boolean
  - value; type=abs
  - number; type=number
  - isNumber; type=boolean
  - isNumeric; type=boolean
  - latex; type=latex
  - text; type=text

  - list; type=math; array[1D]; indexedEntries=math
